implementationSummary: No-op lock-in: existing POST /v1/action-cards/refresh → run_daily_scoring_for_shop → persist_scoring_result already surfaces mid/large Ads workflows when #428 CTR signals rank them. Added three contract tests with analytics product-grain CTR fixtures proving create_activity_7a/update_activity_7c persistence, GET list integration, and idempotent re-refresh. Documented freshness via metadata.computed_at (AC4 skip for new envelope fields).
assumptions: P2-B3 workflow ranking from KPI signals is satisfied by existing scoring.recommendations + kpi_catalog KPI_WORKFLOW_KEYS (no persist.py changes needed)
ROAS/CAC Ads cards remain absent until analytics_spend_denominator ETL (#426 scope)
List freshness for UI uses metadata.computed_at and updated_at — no new top-level envelope field (cache issue owns read-through if needed)
Cards for workflows no longer ranked are not tombstoned — upsert-only model per ADR-021
risks: Stale active cards may linger if a workflow drops out of rankings until explicit status lifecycle is added
Mid/large profile gating requires shop age ≥90d or graduation signals — new shops never see Ads workflow cards even with CTR data
